homepage.heroSubline: Durable driveways built to withstand the Bay Area climate. Expert paving services from Calwest Paving Co.
aboutText: Calwest Paving Co. started with a simple goal: to provide San Francisco residents with durable, beautiful driveways that stand the test of time. Founded by a team of seasoned paving professionals, we've built our reputation on quality workmanship and unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction.

We believe in a straightforward approach. We'll assess your needs, provide a clear and honest estimate, and deliver a finished product that exceeds your expectations. No hidden fees, no shortcuts – just quality paving you can rely on.

We're proud to be a part of the San Francisco community. We source materials locally whenever possible, and we're committed to environmentally responsible practices. We treat every project, big or small, as an opportunity to enhance the beauty and value of our neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Unmatched Durability

services.name: Asphalt Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and cost-effective asphalt driveways for San Francisco homes.
services.description:
Asphalt driveways are a popular choice in San Francisco for their durability and cost-effectiveness. Calwest Paving Co. specializes in asphalt paving, providing smooth, long-lasting surfaces that can handle daily wear and tear. We start by carefully preparing the base, ensuring proper drainage and stability. Our experienced pavers then apply multiple layers of high-quality asphalt, compacting each layer for maximum strength and longevity. 

Whether you need a new asphalt driveway or an asphalt resurfacing, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We carefully grade the asphalt to prevent water pooling, a common issue in San Francisco's rainy climate. We also offer sealcoating services to protect your asphalt from the elements and extend its lifespan. Our asphalt paving process ensures a smooth, even surface that enhances your property's curb appeal and functionality.

From initial excavation to final striping, we handle every aspect of your asphalt driveway project with precision and care. We use only the highest quality materials and equipment to guarantee a durable, long-lasting asphalt driveway that will stand up to the demands of San Francisco living. We also offer asphalt driveway repair services to fix cracks, potholes, and other damage.
process: Step 2: Base Layer Installation and Compaction

faq.question: How long will an asphalt driveway last in San Francisco?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, an asphalt driveway can last 20-30 years in the San Francisco climate. Sealcoating every 2-3 years will significantly extend its lifespan.

faq.question: How much does an asphalt driveway cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size of the driveway, the thickness of the asphalt, and any necessary site preparation. Contact us for a free estimate tailored to your specific needs.

faq.question: How long does it take to install an asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: Most asphalt driveway installations take 1-3 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

services.name: Concrete Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and versatile concrete driveways for San Francisco homes.
services.description:
Concrete driveways offer a durable and versatile paving solution for San Francisco homeowners. Calwest Paving Co. specializes in designing and installing concrete driveways that enhance your property's aesthetic appeal and provide long-lasting performance. We use high-strength concrete mixes that are specifically formulated to withstand the weight of vehicles and the elements.

Our concrete driveway services include everything from initial excavation and grading to concrete pouring and finishing. We offer a variety of decorative concrete options, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete, to create a unique and personalized look for your driveway. We also install proper expansion joints to prevent cracking due to temperature changes, a common issue in San Francisco's varied climate.

We understand the importance of proper drainage in concrete driveway construction. We carefully slope the concrete to ensure water runoff and prevent water damage. Our team of experienced concrete finishers ensures a smooth, even surface that is both aesthetically pleasing and safe to drive on. We are committed to providing San Francisco homeowners with concrete driveways that are built to last.

faq.question: How long does it take for a concrete driveway to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure, but you can usually drive on it after 7 days. We recommend avoiding heavy vehicles during the initial curing period.

faq.question: Can I seal my concrete driveway?
faq.answer: Yes, sealing your concrete driveway can protect it from stains, chemicals, and weathering. We recommend sealing it every 1-2 years.

faq.question: What are the benefits of stamped concrete?
faq.answer: Stamped concrete offers a wide range of decorative patterns and colors, allowing you to create a unique and personalized look for your driveway. It also provides a textured surface that enhances traction.

services.name: Driveway Repair & Resurfacing
services.shortDescription: Fix cracks, potholes, and damage with our driveway repair services.
services.description:
Is your San Francisco driveway showing signs of wear and tear? Cracks, potholes, and uneven surfaces not only detract from your property's appearance but can also pose safety hazards. Calwest Paving Co. offers comprehensive driveway repair and resurfacing services to restore your driveway to its former glory.

We assess the damage to determine the best course of action. Smaller cracks can often be filled with crack filler, while larger cracks may require more extensive repairs. Potholes are patched with high-quality asphalt or concrete, ensuring a seamless and durable repair. If your driveway is severely damaged, resurfacing may be the most cost-effective solution. We'll apply a new layer of asphalt or concrete over the existing surface, providing a fresh, smooth finish.

We understand the importance of timely repairs. Delaying repairs can lead to further damage and more costly repairs down the road. Our team of experienced professionals will quickly and efficiently repair your driveway, minimizing disruption to your daily routine. We pride ourselves on providing affordable and reliable driveway repair services to San Francisco homeowners.

faq.question: How do I know if my driveway needs resurfacing?
faq.answer: If your driveway has numerous cracks, potholes, and an uneven surface, resurfacing may be the best option. We can assess the damage and provide a recommendation.

faq.question: How long does driveway repair take?
faq.answer: Most driveway repairs can be completed in 1-2 days, depending on the extent of the damage.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent driveway cracks?
faq.answer: Proper drainage, regular sealing, and avoiding heavy vehicles can help prevent driveway cracks.

services.name: Driveway Sealcoating
services.shortDescription: Protect your asphalt driveway with our professional sealcoating services.
services.description:
Sealcoating is essential for protecting your asphalt driveway from the elements and extending its lifespan. Calwest Paving Co. offers professional sealcoating services to San Francisco homeowners. Our high-quality sealants create a protective barrier against water, oil, chemicals, and UV rays, preventing damage and deterioration.

We start by thoroughly cleaning your driveway to remove dirt, debris, and loose particles. We then apply a premium-grade sealant evenly across the surface, ensuring complete coverage. Our sealcoating process helps to prevent cracks, potholes, and fading, keeping your driveway looking its best for years to come.

Sealcoating not only protects your driveway but also enhances its appearance. It provides a dark, rich finish that improves curb appeal and adds value to your property. We recommend sealcoating your asphalt driveway every 2-3 years to maintain its optimal condition. Our team of experienced professionals will provide a fast and efficient sealcoating service, minimizing disruption to your daily routine.
benefits: Protects against water, oil, and chemicals

faq.question: How long does sealcoating take to dry?
faq.answer: Sealcoating typically takes 24-48 hours to dry completely. We recommend avoiding driving or walking on the surface during this time.

faq.question: How often should I sealcoat my driveway?
faq.answer: We recommend sealcoating your asphalt driveway every 2-3 years.

faq.question: Can I sealcoat my driveway myself?
faq.answer: While you can sealcoat your driveway yourself, professional sealcoating ensures proper application and a long-lasting finish.

services.name: Decorative Driveway Options
services.shortDescription: Enhance your curb appeal with decorative concrete and paving designs.
services.description:
Looking to add a touch of elegance and personality to your San Francisco home? Calwest Paving Co. offers a wide range of decorative driveway options to enhance your curb appeal and create a unique look for your property. We specialize in stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete, providing endless design possibilities.

Stamped concrete allows you to replicate the look of natural stone, brick, or tile at a fraction of the cost. We offer a variety of patterns and colors to complement your home's architecture and landscaping. Exposed aggregate creates a textured surface with a natural, rustic appearance. Colored concrete adds a vibrant and eye-catching element to your driveway.

Our team of experienced concrete finishers will work with you to design and install a decorative driveway that meets your specific needs and preferences. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting finish. We are committed to providing San Francisco homeowners with decorative driveway options that enhance their property's value and beauty.

faq.question: What is stamped concrete?
faq.answer: Stamped concrete is concrete that has been textured and patterned to resemble natural stone, brick, or tile.

faq.question: How much does stamped concrete cost?
faq.answer: The cost of stamped concrete depends on the pattern, color, and size of the driveway. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: How long does stamped concrete last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, stamped concrete can last for many years.

services.name: Driveway Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Prevent water damage with our expert driveway drainage solutions.
services.description:
Proper drainage is crucial for maintaining the integrity and longevity of your San Francisco driveway. Calwest Paving Co. offers expert driveway drainage solutions to prevent water damage and erosion. We assess your property to identify potential drainage issues and recommend the most effective solutions.

Our drainage services include installing French drains, catch basins, and culverts to redirect water away from your driveway. We also ensure proper grading and sloping to promote water runoff. Our team of experienced professionals will design and install a drainage system that effectively protects your driveway from water damage.

We understand the importance of addressing drainage issues promptly. Water damage can lead to cracks, potholes, and foundation problems, which can be costly to repair. Our drainage solutions are designed to prevent these issues and ensure the long-term stability of your driveway. We are committed to providing San Francisco homeowners with reliable and effective driveway drainage solutions.
process: Step 3: Installation of Drains and Culverts

faq.question: What is a French drain?
faq.answer: A French drain is a trench filled with gravel or rock that contains a perforated pipe to redirect water away from an area.

faq.question: How much does a French drain cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a French drain depends on the length and depth of the trench. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a French drain?
faq.answer: If you have standing water on your driveway or near your foundation, you may need a French drain.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Calwest Paving Co. did an excellent job paving our new asphalt driveway. The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product looks fantastic. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had several large cracks in our concrete driveway. Calwest Paving Co. repaired the cracks quickly and effectively. The price was reasonable, and the service was great.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Calwest Paving Co. sealcoated our asphalt driveway and it looks brand new! The team was professional and thorough, and the price was very competitive. I appreciate the attention to detail.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: We hired Calwest Paving Co. to install a stamped concrete driveway, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The design is beautiful, and the workmanship is top-notch. It completely transformed the look of our home!

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: Calwest Paving Co. installed a French drain system to address water pooling issues on our driveway. The problem is completely resolved, and we are very pleased with the service.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Our old asphalt driveway was cracked and uneven. Calwest Paving Co. resurfaced it, and it looks fantastic. The team was professional and efficient, and the price was reasonable.
